Container.Name: Patch-Pulse
Container.Overview:
Release notes + CVE context for your Docker container updates.
Features: - Auto-discovers every running Docker container - Polls Docker Hub / GHCR / Quay for new image versions (default: every 6 hours) - Fetches release notes when a new version appears (GitHub Releases → CHANGELOG.md → commit log) - Scans the running image for unfixed CVEs via bundled Grype - One-row-per-container web UI - Optional Update now button (docker compose pull && up -d), gated by a service-name confirmation
First-run: - Open the WebUI — the wizard will ask you to create an admin - No YAML config files. Everything lives in the web UI.
Pre-release beta — report issues on GitHub.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Read-only = notify + CVE scan only. Remove :ro and enable the Update action in Settings to use the 'Update now' button in the UI.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Optional. Seed the admin username non-interactively. Leave blank to create via the first-run web wizard.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional. Seed the admin password non-interactively. Leave blank to create via the first-run web wizard (recommended).
